title: Like Father like albino replica of dead wife
display_title: Like Father like albino replica of dead wife
wikitext:
[]: Like Father like albino replica of dead wife?             Quote Post by Jobhug » Wed Mar 07, 2007 10:32 pm Did anyone else notice in episode 18 when Asuka is mouthing off at Toji and Shinji in front of the class, Rei is sitting in the Gendo Ikari stance instead of her standard looking out the window stance? I thought that was funny, even though it probably wasn't intentional. Or was it? If anyone has a screencap feel free to post it.

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Wed Mar 07, 2007 10:52 pm Do you mean this one? Looks like the typical bored student in a classroom pose to me. Lots of people do it (myself included). I suppose Rei, idolizing Gendo like she does, may have picked it up from him without even knowing it though.

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Wed Mar 07, 2007 11:27 pm She does that many times, Often enough for it to feature in this parody pic at least:

[]:             Quote Post by Jobhug » Wed Mar 07, 2007 11:34 pm There was a different shot that i was referring to in particular, with Hikari in the foreground. I'll admit I was bored when I started this thread and I didn't really think I had stumbled on the secret evidence that proved that Gendo's soul was in unit zero or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Thu Mar 08, 2007 1:13 am I cross my fingers during class all the time when I'm bored. Still, interesting that you picked that up, even if it's not very relevant. :p

[]:             Quote Post by Jay911 » Thu Mar 08, 2007 1:20 am TriLink12 wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by HenkZw » Thu Mar 08, 2007 3:50 am The original post reminds me of that fanfiction story where Asuka talks Shinji & Rei into re-playing events from the series. The 3 play different roles. Rei really wants to play Gendo, but remains in character. Which was nice.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 08, 2007 6:46 am Rei =/= albino I had to say it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 08, 2007 3:09 pm What I think is funny is how in one episode (9, I think?) Misato was doing the Gendo pose while saying "I'll defeat the Angels without fail." I tend to sit that way, too, but not with my mouth under my hands. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Fearthebait » Thu Mar 08, 2007 10:03 pm i sit like that to, but usually with hands up to my nose ><

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Thu Mar 08, 2007 10:51 pm I hate to admit that ever since watching NGE I tend to assume that pose when playing poker. It's just a badass pose.

[]:             Quote Post by Jobhug » Fri Mar 09, 2007 1:23 am Owing to this fact my original post had no other value (Hehe, reminds me of that whole "I have no other value" trip from EoTV, everything anyone ever says now has a corresponding line in Evangelion...), I hereby dedicate this thread to the Gendo Ikari stance, in all it's glorious forms.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Fri Mar 09, 2007 1:29 am Heh. After I watched Eva, I became morally obligated to do so everytime I sat at a desk, and it became force of habit. <_< I am such a nerd.

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Fri Mar 09, 2007 4:55 am Trigger's Elysium wrote: Heh. After I watched Eva, I became morally obligated to do so everytime I sat at a desk, and it became force of habit. <_< I am such a nerd.

[]:             Quote Post by Omegagouki » Fri Mar 09, 2007 6:10 am I find myself doing it unconsciously sometimes. XD And then when I notice I'm doing the pose, I try to make it more... accurate XD Oh, and I also usually notice when someone else is doing the pose or a facimile thereof in other works.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Fri Mar 09, 2007 10:36 am Misato does that one too, in episode 9.
